business.headline: Is stock market closed or open today? Check NSE, BSE holiday for Mahavir JayantiMarkets will remain shut on March 31 for Mahavir Jayanti and again on April 3 for Good Friday. This means that out of five trading days in the week, markets will be open only for three sessions.

This fall is linked to several factors, including rising global uncertainty due to the West Asia conflict, tariff-related news, volatility in base metal prices, higher trading margins, and profit booking in stocks that performed strongly through 2025.

The total market capitalisation of BSE-listed companies fell from Rs 421.62 lakh crore at the previous close to Rs 412.72 lakh crore, wiping out nearly Rs 9 lakh crore in a single session.

Rishab Shetty clears Instagram list, keeps just three follows. Find out who Rishab Shetty's social media changes attract attention amid ongoing film projects. The Kanthara star now follows only two accounts. Read here to know which ones.

Live: Indian worker killed in Kuwait amid missile debris fallUS-Israel-Iran War Live Updates: As the Iran-US-Israel conflict intensifies, multiple flashpoints are emerging across the region, signalling a dangerous escalation. White House Press Secretary Karoline Leavitt said President Donald Trump is open to asking Middle Eastern allies to help finance ongoing military operations against Iran, even as Tehran insists it will not step back without compensation. Meanwhile, thousands of US Army troops from the elite 82nd Airborne Division have begun arriving in the region, deepening Washington's military footprint.  Iranian sources also claimed a Mahan Air civilian plane bound for New Delhi on a humanitarian medicines mission was struck at Mashhad airport. In Tehran, Supreme Leader Ayatollah Mojtaba Khamenei, in a fourth written statement, hailed Revolutionary Guard Navy chief Alireza Tangsiri as a brave symbol of Iran's Gulf presence. He was killed last week in a strike. Stay with IndiaToday.in for the latest and live updates.
